reviews.review_description:
It's retrogrames meeting VR and the game design is brilliant.
It's short, yes, but SO hard, and it was made for a jam, in the end.
rotate didn't work in maze level.

I used my computer chair and me and my son play it as how far can you go amazing virtual reality experience we can't stop playing play with your friends and family see how far you can get again great game keep them coming

This game took me a long while of playing off and on to beat. Easily a total of 2-4 hrs playtime. It’s challenging but fair, and a great use of be. If you like puzzle games this is a must have free one.

Really is one of the greatest experiences on the Oculus Go in my opinion. Love the 8 bit graphic, the music is decent, and it really is a challenge since you have to use your head to navigate. It's amazing for what it is. It's a free fun experience! And I recommend it to anybody interested in a challenge!
